data.title: Viettel achieves breakthrough with self-developed 5G Core network, named one of top global providers in core networks by Omdia.
data.description: In a recent report titled "Market Landscape: Core Vendors – 2025," global technology research and advisory firm Omdia has acknowledged Viettel, based in Hanoi, Vietnam, as a prominent 4G/5G core network provider. Viettel has been spotlighted among the top core network companies internationally. This recognition provides a significant validation of Viettel's standing in the industry as it continues to excel in this sector.

data.title: GAC provides official fleet and 24/7 support for the 15th National Games in Hong Kong and Macao, involving multiple simultaneous events.
data.description: The 15th National Games of the People's Republic of China, along with the 12th National Games for Persons with Disabilities and the 9th National Special Olympic Games, held official vehicle handover ceremonies in Hong Kong and Macao on October 24, 2025. These events mark significant milestones, showcasing the commitment and participation of participants from various backgrounds. The ceremonies were attended by representatives and athletes, highlighting the importance of unity and sportsmanship with a focus on inclusivity. This marked a historic moment in the region, emphasizing the significance of these games in fostering community spirit and camaraderie.

data.title: 2025 marks 20th anniversary of "Two Mountains Theory" in China emphasizing importance of green development.
data.description: In Beijing on October 24, 2025, it was reported that the "Two Mountains Theory" celebrates its 20th anniversary this year. This concept emphasizes the importance of clear waters and lush mountains as valuable assets, underscoring the critical role of green development in China.

data.title: LangSmith boosts agent monitoring with Insights Agent & Multi-turn Evaluations, improving user interaction outcomes & delivering valuable AI insights.
data.description: LangSmith has launched two new features, Insights Agent and Multi-turn Evaluations, aimed at improving agent monitoring and enhancing user interaction outcomes. These features aim to provide valuable insights for AI teams. This move is part of LangSmith's efforts to boost efficiency and effectiveness in agent interactions.

data.title: Loomis AB to release Interim report for Jan-Sep 2025 on Oct 31, 2025, at 7:30 a.m. (CET) via Cision.
data.description: On October 31, 2025, at 7:30 a.m. (CET), Loomis AB is set to release its Interim report for the period of January-September 2025. The report will be distributed through Cision's press release service (www.cision.se). Investors and stakeholders can expect key financial figures and overall performance updates in the upcoming release by Loomis AB.

data.title: Qualigen Therapeutics (QLGN) stock surges 62% after-hours on partnership with BitGo to build multi-asset crypto treasury.
data.description: Shares of Qualigen Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: QLGN) surged in after-hours trading on Thursday following its collaboration with digital asset firm BitGo to enhance its multi-asset cryptocurrency treasury strategy. QLGN exhibited strong momentum, with its stock soaring over 60% after hours, in addition to its gains during regular trading. The California-based biotech company's partnership with BitGo led to this significant rally. For more details, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: T-Mobile reports Q3 earnings meeting estimates, gains high-spending subscribers, stock falls on competition worries.
data.description: In the third quarter, T-Mobile announced earnings and revenue that slightly surpassed analyst expectations. The company attracted a greater number of lucrative phone subscribers than anticipated. However, concerns over heightened competition in the wireless market led to a decline in T-Mobile's stock.
